mapper.sql: tenant_id as tenantId, db_type as dbType, driver_class as driverClass, jdbc_url as jdbcUrl, username as username, password as password, enabled as enabled, sql_inpatient_range as sqlInpatientRange, sql_outpatient_range as sqlOutpatientRange, remark as remark, create_time as createTime
mapper.select:
select
from sys_his_external_db where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and enabled = '1' limit 1

select
from sys_his_external_db where tenant_id = #{tenantId} limit 1

select
from sys_his_external_db
and tenant_id like concat('%', #{tenantId}, '%')
and upper(db_type) = upper(#{dbType})
and enabled = #{enabled}
order by tenant_id
mapper.update: update sys_his_external_db set db_type = #{dbType}, driver_class = #{driverClass}, jdbc_url = #{jdbcUrl}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, enabled = #{enabled}, sql_inpatient_range = #{sqlInpatientRange}, sql_outpatient_range = #{sqlOutpatientRange}, remark = #{remark} where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
